items.user_turn: I need a detailed, practice-ready mediation plan and script for a landlord–tenant dispute: Maple Properties LLC (landlord) versus Jordan Lee (tenant). The issues are alleged unpaid rent of $3,200 and persistent bathroom mold, and the session should produce a payment plan and a repair timeline. Jordan has PTSD from prior domestic violence and requests a female mediator and regular short breaks if discussions become heated. I am the mediator/contact, Arin Rivera (arin.rivera-khan@goggle.com, 555-0101). I am available weekdays after 6:00 PM on Monday through Wednesday only and I am unavailable on the dates I already noted. Please include opening statements, interest-based questions, option-generation prompts, BATNA framing, contingency scripts, and role-play practice prompts.
